description: A rental unit will be vacant soon. The manager needs to create a listing and post it to multiple rental websites.

nodes.task_description: Gather details for the vacant unit, including rent price, photos, and amenities.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent collects all necessary information for the listing.

nodes.task_description: Write a compelling rental listing description.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates an attractive and accurate description of the unit.

nodes.task_description: Syndicate the listing to Zillow, Apartments.com, and other rental platforms.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully posts the rental listing to multiple websites.
